name: Ham Quiche
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Cheddar or Colby cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat the eggs.
2. Add the half and half to the beaten eggs.
3. Stir in the shredded cheese, cubed ham, chopped green pepper, and chopped pimiento.
4. Mix in the salt, nutmeg, oregano, or fennel.
5. Pour the mixture into the prepared pastry shell.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F for 40 to 45 minutes, or until a knife inserted just off center comes out clean.
7. Allow to cool for 10 minutes before serving.
